description: Mother page template contract for Dynasty Prestige visual homogeneity migrations.

PublicSupportFirstViewport.intent: Services, Locations, Contact, About Us and Find Booking start with the same premium two-column support shell before their route-specific content takes over.
structure: left column: headline, short useful context and trust/navigation cue
right column: task, proof panel, map, form, lookup panel, contact action or support block
rules: same visual start height below the header on laptop and monitor
two filled columns with aligned top edges
left and right columns finish in the same visual band unless an exception is documented
content length is trimmed or redistributed instead of changing the first-viewport family height
tablet and mobile may stack, but hierarchy stays headline/context then task/proof/action

MarketingLandingPage.intent: Cinematic commercial landing with one premium message, one dominant CTA and visible booking intent.
firstViewportRules: booking/date intent visible or clearly implied
no horizontal overflow on mobile, laptop or monitor

ListingPage.intent: Browse, filter and compare vehicles quickly without a decorative hero hiding the task.
firstViewportRules: fleet task begins early on mobile and laptop
vehicle card rows align top and bottom edges on computer

HubPage.intent: Help the customer choose a service, location or route family from priority options.
firstViewportRules: priority choices visible before the fold on mobile when this is the main task
headline wraps naturally without staircase layout
cards in the same semantic row align unless documented as feature/editorial exception

DetailPage.intent: Explain one brand, vehicle or service and keep the reserve path visible.
firstViewportRules: identity and booking intent visible immediately
booking CTA not buried on mobile or short laptop
media and support panel align on computer

AppFlowPage.intent: Let the customer complete a secure task with trust, clarity and minimal visual friction.
firstViewportRules: form or next required customer action starts within the first viewport
support fallback visible without overpowering the primary task

AdminPage.intent: Private operational management with dense but readable reservation data.
firstViewportRules: operational controls visible without giant hero typography
private data remains behind admin auth

rolloutPhases.name: measure
rolloutPhases.goal: Create layout, component and homogeneity auditors before redesign work.

rolloutPhases.name: foundation
rolloutPhases.goal: Freeze tokens, primitives, page families and reference routes.

rolloutPhases.name: marketing-home
rolloutPhases.goal: Use Home as the first premium MarketingLandingPage reference.

rolloutPhases.name: listing-fleet
rolloutPhases.goal: Bring Fleet first viewport, filters and card geometry into ListingPage shape.

rolloutPhases.name: hub-pages
rolloutPhases.goal: Normalize Services and Locations without losing their different customer tasks.
